message:
🐛 Fix update indicator showing for demo/Helm users (#2316)

Two bugs caused the update indicator to incorrectly appear for
demo users on Helm installs accessed via localhost:

1. Channel stuck on 'developer': localhost defaults to 'developer'
   channel, but backend reports 'helm' install method. The developer
   option gets filtered from the dropdown (only valid for dev installs),
   leaving the dropdown empty while the channel state stays 'developer'.
   Fix: auto-reset channel to 'stable' when installMethod changes and
   the current channel is no longer valid.

2. Update indicator in demo mode: SHA comparison on developer channel
   finds a mismatch and shows the navbar update button, even though
   demo users cannot perform updates.
   Fix: hide UpdateIndicator when isDemoMode() is true.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
